stemHtml: When Fowler type trailing edge flaps are extended at a constant angle of attack, the following changes will occur:

options.a: C<sub>D</sub> decreases and the centre of pressure moves aft.
options.b: C<sub>L</sub> increases and the centre of pressure moves forward.
options.d: C<sub>L</sub> increases and C<sub>D</sub> remains constant.
